label: Glassgut Pantry
description: Glassgut Pantry is a narrow, sealed storage room cut into the Stillhouse’s wedge footprint, its walls faced with vitrified tile scored by grounded gutters. Shallow lensing basins along the upper courses trap the copper-white twilight into steady bands, keeping the interior legible without open flame or bright fixtures. Built-in shelves of fused silicate hold tightly lidded bins and casks, their rims ringed with antistatic metal to prevent glass-dust adhesion. The floor slopes imperceptibly to a gridded drain that carries conductive runoff into the residence’s grounding channel.
